news.headline: Mila and Ability Biologics collaborate to boost AI in antibody discovery; creating synergy from research to commercial stage.
news.summary: Ability Biologics has recently formed a significant partnership with Mila - Quebec Artificial Intelligence Institute in Montreal. The collaboration will combine Mila's vast network of AI and machine learning specialists with Ability's expertise in various areas such as immunology, antibody discovery, engineering, and therapeutic development. This partnership aims to drive innovation from research to the clinical and commercial phases. With Mila's renowned experts and researchers in AI and Ability's proficiency in immunology, antibody research, and therapeutic development, this union is poised to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: BostonGene to discuss AI-driven cancer care at the 14th AVBCC Summit in NYC on Oct 16-18. Focus on value-based models.
news.summary: BostonGene, headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts, is a prominent company offering AI-driven molecular and immune profiling solutions. They have disclosed their involvement in the upcoming 14th Annual Association for Value-Based Cancer Care (AVBCC) Summit and Educational Program, set to occur from October 16 to 18 in New York City. This event will gather oncology experts, insurers, and business figures to delve into the adoption of value-based frameworks that seek to improve the efficiency and affordability of cancer care.

news.headline: SoFi partners with Galileo for commercial payment services, adopting Cyberbank Core platform for enhancement in programs.
news.summary: SoFi is improving its business payment services by incorporating Galileo's Cyberbank Core platform, a cloud-based system.

news.headline: EQ Bank partners with DataVisor for advanced fraud protection; aims to enhance capabilities using AI-powered suite.
news.summary: In Mountain View, California, DataVisor, a top AI-driven fraud and risk platform, revealed that EQ Bank has chosen their new fraud detection suite to strengthen its fraud prevention abilities. EQ Bank, the digital division of Canada's Challenger Bank™, aims to revolutionize banking and improve customers' lives. By incorporating DataVisor's advanced fraud protection tools, EQ Bank can bolster its defenses against fraudulent activities in its various competitive banking services, ensuring a broad scope of enhanced security measures.

news.headline: Renesas unveils 4-channel IO-Link master IC & 2-channel sensor signal conditioner IC for expanding IO-Link market.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Renesas has introduced two new solutions for the rapidly expanding IO-Link sector. This includes a 4-channel IO-Link master IC and a 2-channel resistive sensor signal conditioner IC. These innovations cater to the increasing demand in this market segment.

news.headline: Teledyne helps NASA's Europa Clipper with MISE instrument. Launch at Kennedy Space Center with 9 science instruments.
news.summary: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE: TDY) has proudly supported NASA's recent Europa Clipper launch from the Kennedy Space Center. The Mapping Imaging Spectrometer for Europa (MISE), developed by Teledyne, is among nine scientific instruments onboard the spacecraft. MISE will aid in exploring Europa's geological past and evaluating the habitability of its ocean. This instrument, utilizing Teledyne CHROMA-A technology, promises groundbreaking discoveries in space exploration.

news.headline: Xsight Labs selects Larch Networks as Center of Excellence for Hardened SONiC in San Jose, California & Tel Aviv, Israel.
news.summary: Xsight Labs has selected Larch Networks in Tel Aviv, Israel, as a Center of Excellence for their Hardened SONiC technology. This partnership aims to enhance the development and implementation of SONiC, providing improved networking solutions. The collaboration between the two companies signifies a significant milestone in the networking industry.

news.headline: Nyle and Htec introduce Pyroclast™ Commercial Integrated Heat Pump Water Heater, which doesn't require water storage.
news.summary: A revolutionary heat pump water heater, the Pyroclast™ Commercial Integrated Heat Pump Water Heater, has been introduced by Nyle Water Heating Systems in partnership with Htec Packaged. Unlike traditional water heaters, this innovative solution does not require water storage. The launch took place in Bangor, Maine on October 16, 2024. This game-changing product is set to redefine the industry with its advanced technology and energy-saving features.

news.headline: Broadly named Vendor of the Year by Neighborly for the fourth time. Awarded for outstanding service.
news.summary: Broadly, a California-based company, was recently honored with the Vendor of the Year award by Neighborly®, a global leader in home services. The award was given in recognition of Broadly's exceptional service and innovative solutions utilizing artificial intelligence (AI) in customer engagement. This accolade serves as a testament to Broadly's commitment to delivering high-impact results. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024, in Santa Barbara. This award highlights Broadly's position as a frontrunner in the industry and solidifies their reputation for outstanding performance.

news.headline: Juniper Square acquires Forstone Luxembourg to expand global fund administration; announcement made on Oct 16, 2024.
news.summary: Juniper Square, a prominent company specializing in fund software and administration solutions for private markets, revealed on October 16, 2024, a decisive deal to purchase Forstone Luxembourg, a sector of Forstone Group. This acquisition aims to broaden Juniper Square's global presence and enhance its services.

news.headline: U.S. Army to modernize IPPS-A on Oracle Cloud to reduce costs and enhance security, supporting readiness and auditability.
news.summary: The U.S. Army plans to migrate its Integrated Personnel and Pay System-Army (IPPS-A) to Oracle U.S. Defense Cloud in a move expected to cut costs and boost security. This migration aims to enhance information access, ultimately supporting readiness and auditability. The development, set in Austin, Texas, as of October 16, 2024, is crucial as it involves transitioning critical military personnel and pay data. This shift is anticipated to improve operational efficiency while maintaining a strong focus on data protection and system reliability.

news.headline: CalciMedica to present at ACG 2024 with focus on CRAC channel inhibition therapies for inflammatory diseases.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in La Jolla, California, CalciMedica Inc. announced its plans for developing innovative therapies targeting calcium release-activated calcium (CRAC) channel inhibition for inflammatory and immunologic conditions. As a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, CalciMedica, trading under the symbol CALC on Nasdaq, aims to address both acute and chronic health issues through its research and development efforts.

news.headline: Tri-City Healthcare under investigation for data breach of 108,149 patient records, impacting personal and health info.
news.summary: A law firm, Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP, is currently looking into a data breach that has affected the private personal and health data of 108,149 patients who are under the care of TriCity Healthcare District. This district is responsible for managing Tri-City Medical Center, a public healthcare facility located in California.

news.headline: Allergan Aesthetics to present 12 abstracts at 2024 ASDS showcasing insights and patient outcomes in facial aesthetics.
news.summary: Allergan Aesthetics showcased its dedication to patient outcomes and in-depth understanding of various patient segments through the presentation of 12 abstracts, with four recognized as Best of Cosmetic Abstracts. The event featured a panel discussion led by Dr. Kavita Mariwalla from the American Society for Dermatologic Surgery (ASDS).

news.headline: Hyundai Mobis to establish 300,000-unit electrification plant in Slovakia, with completion by second half of next year.
news.summary: Hyundai Mobis recently signed an investment agreement on the 15th to establish its inaugural European PE system production base in Novaky, Slovakia. The plant is scheduled to have an annual production capacity of 300,000 units and is expected to be completed by the second half of the following year. This initiative marks a significant expansion for the company in the region. The news was unveiled from SEOUL, South Korea on October 16th.

news.headline: Skan AI releases new "Real-time Execution Visibility" tool to improve AML programs in banks. Launch announced on Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Skan AI, a prominent provider of work and process intelligence solutions based in Menlo Park, California, unveiled a new offering on October 16, 2024, aimed at enhancing Anti-Money Laundering (AML) programs within the banking sector. This groundbreaking solution seeks to tackle significant gaps in AML processes.

news.headline: Alaska Airlines revamps Mileage Plan for 2025 by improving benefits and accelerating elite status attainment. Members earn perks faster through different activities like award travel and credit card purchases. New global earning and redemption options to be introduced.
news.summary: Milestones for members are now rewarded earlier, with the ability to select from a range of perks. Members can accumulate elite-qualifying miles to achieve milestones and status by utilizing award travel redemptions, credit card transactions, and other methods. Additional options will be introduced to facilitate earning and redeeming globally.

news.headline: Precision AQ appoints Lance Grady as EVP, Managing Partner for Access Consulting & HEOR to drive growth in life science industry.
news.summary: An experienced professional in the industry has joined Precision AQ to oversee the expansion of the Access Consulting and Health Economics and Outcomes Research (HEOR) divisions. This announcement was made on October 16, 2024, in New York. Precision AQ is known for its expertise in assisting life science companies navigate the challenges of product commercialization.

news.headline: FDA clears Bracco Diagnostics Inc. and Subtle Medical's AiMIFY™ software for MRI enhancement.
news.summary: In Monroe Township, New Jersey on October 16, 2024, it was announced that Bracco Diagnostics Inc., a U.S. subsidiary of Bracco Imaging S.p.A, a prominent company in the diagnostic imaging sector, has entered into a collaboration with Subtle Medical, Inc., an innovative firm specializing in artificial intelligence (AI)-powered image analysis. This partnership aims to combine Bracco's expertise with Subtle Medical's AI technology to advance the field of diagnostic imaging. This collaboration is set to leverage the strengths of both companies to improve efficiency and accuracy in medical diagnoses.

news.headline: Color Health expands virtual cancer clinic to over 45 employers, health plans, and unions nationwide, offering comprehensive care.
news.summary: A Virtual Cancer Clinic introduced by Color Health is being launched to more than 45 employers, health plans, and unions nationally. On October 16, 2024, the company from Burlingame, California, made this announcement. They are expanding the nation's pioneer fully integrated virtual cancer clinic to provide comprehensive cancer care services to a wider audience.

news.headline: Study shows SeptiCyte® RAPID effectively identifies sepsis in diverse patients, regardless of demographics or medical conditions.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Seattle and Brisbane, Australia, SeptiCyte® RAPID showed reliable performance in distinguishing sepsis from Systemic Inflammatory Response Syndrome (SIRS) consistently across different demographic groups and regardless of the presence or absence of underlying medical conditions. This innovative technology has proven effective in accurately identifying sepsis cases, a vital step in early diagnosis and treatment. The study conducted underscores the significance of SeptiCyte® RAPID as a valuable tool in the medical field for prompt and precise differentiation between sepsis and SIRS, showcasing its potential impact on patient outcomes.

news.headline: DPR Construction's Richmond office expansion showcases innovative practices, emphasizing technology and self-perform teams.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia on October 16, 2024, DPR Construction, a top technical builder known for handling intricate projects, revealed the successful finishing of its latest relocation initiative. By leveraging technology and self-perform teams, DPR Construction has streamlined the relocation process, showcasing construction best practices.

news.headline: Convoy of Hope teams up with Niagara Cares, providing over 2 million water bottles to 140,000 people in Southeast U.S.
news.summary: Aid has been provided to close to 140,000 individuals in the Southeast U.S. with over 2 million bottles of water. This effort is a collaboration between Convoy of Hope and Niagara Cares, assisting those affected by a disaster in the region. The initiative, led by the nonprofit organization Convoy of Hope and the humanitarian organization Niagara Cares, has successfully distributed this significant quantity of water to individuals in need. The distribution has taken place in the Southeast U.S., particularly benefiting nearly 140,000 people.

news.headline: Promethium appoints Prat Moghe as new CEO to support growth. Founder Kaycee Lai becomes Chief Strategy Officer. Expanding leadership team.
news.summary: Kaycee Lai, the founder, will be transitioning to the role of Chief Strategy Officer at Promethium in San Francisco on October 16, 2024. The company is known for its AI-native data fabric that simplifies the process of generating data products through its GenAI technology. Lai will concentrate on enhancing the product vision and promoting innovation. The company has received several awards for its innovative solutions, and this move reflects Promethium's commitment to driving further growth and development.

news.headline: Brink’s to release Q3 2024 earnings & host conference call on Nov 6 at 9AM (ET). Financial results to be announced.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Richmond, Virginia, The Brink’s Company (NYSE: BCO), a prominent worldwide provider of cash and valuables management, digital retail solutions, and ATM managed services, announced their conference call scheduled for Wednesday, November 6, at 9:00 a.m. (ET). The call will be held to discuss the financial outcomes of the third quarter of 2024. The numbers and details in the financial report will be disclosed earlier on the same day before the call takes place.

news.headline: Olo Inc. (NYSE: OLO) to report Q3 FY2024 results on Nov 7, 2024 after US market close, with earnings call at 5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Olo Inc., a prominent restaurant technology provider listed on NYSE under the symbol OLO, disclosed plans to reveal its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024 following the closure of U.S. financial markets on Thursday, November 7, 2024. The company will conduct a conference call on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to review its financial results and future financial guidance. Interested individuals can access a live webcast of the conference call.

news.headline: Coupon rates for Nykredit Realkredit A/S are being adjusted, impacting investors and borrowers; stay informed for details.
Reynolds Consumer Products to announce Q3 2024 financials on Oct 30, 2024; webcast at 7:00 am CT, hosted by CEO and CFO. Live stream at investors.rey.
news.summary: Lake Forest, Illinois-based Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. (Nasdaq: REYN) is set to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Wednesday, October 30, 2024. The Company's President and CEO, Lance Mitchell, along with CFO Scott Huckins, will conduct a live webcast at 7:00 a.m. CT (8:00 a.m. ET) on the same day to discuss the outcomes. Interested individuals can access the webcast and accompanying earnings resources through a link provided at https://investors.rey.

news.headline: Sierra Space receives NASA contract to develop Trash Compaction and Processing System for ISS test in late-2026. Important for space exploration sustainability.
news.summary: Sierra Space, a prominent commercial space company and defense tech prime based in Louisville, Colorado, has revealed that they have secured a NASA contract. The contract pertains to the development of a Trash Compaction and Processing System (TCPS) that will undergo testing on the International Space Station around late 2026. This technology is seen as essential for upcoming space expeditions and aims to address crucial aspects such as waste management, stowage, and water reclamation for extended missions. This initiative showcases Sierra Space's commitment to innovation and advancement in space exploration.

news.headline: IHOP awards Brandon & Shaleeza Collins as 2023 Franchisee of the Year at Global Franchisee Conference. Warmed North Baton Rouge community with restaurant since 2006. Brandon & Shaleeza took over in 2023.
news.summary: IHOP® in Pasadena, California, has recognized Brandon & Shaleeza Collins as the 2023 Franchisee of the Year at the Global Franchisee Conference. Brandon's parents, Ella and Larry Collins, established their IHOP restaurant in 2006 to serve the North Baton Rouge community. After gaining experience in the restaurant business, Brandon and Shaleeza took over the restaurant in 2023. Their dedication and commitment to the brand have been exemplary, leading to this prestigious award ceremony which attracted a large audience.

news.headline: Easterly Gov Properties (NYSE: DEA) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 5, 2024. Conference call on same day at 11am ET.
news.summary: In Washington today, Easterly Government Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DEA) revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 5, 2024. The disclosure will be accompanied by a conference call scheduled for 11:00am Eastern time on the same day. During the call, the management team will delve into the performance of the third quarter, highlight recent developments, and engage in a question-and-answer session. Those interested in participating in the call and posing questions are encouraged to register to receive the dial-in details.

news.headline: Slate Grocery REIT (TSX: SGR.U) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6 before market hours. Live call at 9 am ET.
news.summary: In Toronto, Slate Grocery REIT (TSX: SGR.U) (TSX: SGR.UN) disclosed plans to unveil its Q3 2024 financial report on November 6, 2024, before the market opens. Senior management will conduct a live conference call at 9:00 am ET on the same day to delve into the results and current business strategies. Investors can join the conference call for further details.

news.headline: Ulta Beauty sets long-term financial targets at 2024 Investor Day, emphasizing growth strategy and profitability. CEO confident in company's strong position for future.
news.summary: Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ: ULTA) based in Bolingbrook, Illinois, is holding its 2024 Investor Day to disclose strategic priorities and new long-term financial targets aimed at driving profitable growth. CEO Dave Kimbell highlighted Ulta's leadership in a growing sector, emphasizing the company's strong financial position for long-term investments. With over 30 years of experience, Ulta Beauty remains at the forefront of the industry.

news.headline: Perfect Corp announces new Halloween features on YouCam apps for its 1.1 billion users worldwide.
news.summary: Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF), a prominent provider of AI and AR-driven beauty and fashion technology solutions, and the creative mind behind the widely used YouCam app suite, reveals plans for the 2024 debut of enhanced Halloween-themed AI capabilities. With a significant milestone of over 1.1 billion downloads globally, Perfect Corp. announces the upcoming release featuring fresh AI Avatar characters, AI Fashion costume styles, AI Selfie transformations, and AI Art Text-to-Image functions.

news.headline: SKUx and Mondelēz Int'l complete first phase of payment-based offer innovation project with  Hedera DLT network.
news.summary: A payment technology company, SKUx, has unveiled the initial stage of its payment-based offer innovation project in collaboration with Mondelēz International and Hedera, a prominent enterprise distributed ledger technology (DLT) network. Mondelēz International, a member of the Hedera Council aiming to promote healthy snacking habits, joined forces with SKUx to utilize innovative DLT solutions. This strategic partnership marks a significant milestone in the project's progression.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs honors OneRail CEO Bill Catania as Most Exceptional Entrepreneur of 2024. Event held in California, Catania recognized for his work in developing real-time technology networks.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) is acknowledging Bill Catania, Founder & CEO of OneRail, as one of the Most Exceptional Entrepreneurs of 2024. This recognition is taking place at the Builders and Innovators Summit in Healdsburg, California. Chosen from a pool of candidates in various sectors, Catania will be celebrated during the summit which spans two days. Catania is recognized for his efforts in driving innovation through the development and implementation of real-time technology networks at his startup, OneRail, which specializes in last-mile omnichannel fulfillment services.

news.headline: Maple from Canada sponsors American brunch dates with Canadians through Maple Mate initiative, encouraging pure maple syrup with 13,500 farmers involved.
news.summary: In preparation for cuffing season, Maple from Canada, a brand advocating for over 13,500 maple farmers, is promoting the use of pure maple syrup for romantic dates. The initiative, Maple Mate, aims to incentivize Americans to enjoy maple syrup by offering to cover the expenses for hundreds of single Americans nationwide, provided they invite a Canadian to brunch. To claim this offer, Americans must match with Canadians on a designated platform.

news.headline: Enphase Energy launches IQ8X microinverters in Netherlands and Austria, IQ8 series in Malta and New Caledonia, expanding into new markets.
news.summary: In Fremont, California on October 16, 2024, Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), a renowned energy technology firm and the primary provider of microinverter-based solar and battery systems globally, revealed the commencement of shipments of IQ8™ Microinverters. These microinverters are aimed at bolstering modern, high-energy solar panels in specific regions and countries. The initial focus areas for this initiative include the Netherlands, Austria, Malta, and New Caledonia. This development marks Enphase's debut in the solar markets of Malta and New Caledonia.

news.headline: Bunge expands Global Volunteer Program, with employees in 85 cities joining events to support food security, a 30% increase from 2023.
news.summary: Highlighting the importance of United Nations' World Food Day, Bunge, a global company, has broadened its Global Volunteer Program by engaging employees globally in various events. Over 85 cities worldwide are set to participate, marking a significant 30% growth from the previous year. The initiative aims to bolster food security in regions where Bunge has a presence. Through a month-long campaign collaborating with local non-profit organizations, the employees are dedicated to advocating for nutrition and...

news.headline: Prologis Inc. reported Q3 results with net earnings per diluted share at $1.08 (up 35%), Core FFO at $1.43 (up 10%) and revenue of $2.036B.
news.summary: Prologis, Inc., a leader in logistics real estate, reported its financial performance for Q3 2024 compared to the same period in 2023. Net earnings per diluted share increased by 35.0% to $1.08, with Core FFO per diluted share rising by 10.0% to $1.43. During Q3 2024, acquisitions totaled $1.25 billion, development stabilizations reached $784 million, and total dispositions and contributions were $836 million. The company's forecasted earnings for 2024, 2025, and 2026 are 99%, 99%, and 98% respectively. Prologis' guidance for net earnings and Core FFO was revised for 2024, with net earnings ranging from $3.35 to $3.45 per diluted share and Core FFO from $5.42 to $5.46 per diluted share. The company reported total assets of $95.9 billion as of September 30, 2024, with total liabilities of $38.2 billion. Additionally, Prologis focuses on high-barrier, high-growth markets and leases modern logistics facilities to around 6,700 customers. They are optimistic about the future amid the ongoing flight to quality in the industry, projecting strong demand and considering themselves the partner of choice for leading global customers.

news.headline: BlueLinx (NYSE: BXC) will release Q3 2024 financial results on October 29, followed by a conference call on October 30 at 10:00 AM ET.
news.summary: In Atlanta, BlueLinx Holdings Inc., a prominent U.S. wholesale distributor of building products listed on the NYSE as BXC, is set to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 post-market closing on Tuesday, October 29, 2024. The discussion on these results will be led by Shyam Reddy, President & CEO, along with Andy Wamser, CFO, in a conference call scheduled for Wednesday, October 30, 2024, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. The call will also be available via webcast along with a presentation.

news.headline: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: CRNX) to share Q3 2024 financial results on Nov. 12, 2024 post-market close, followed by conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: San Diego-based company Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRNX) shared plans to release their financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 12, 2024, after the market closes. Following this, a conference call led by company management will take place at 4:30 p.m. ET to delve into the financial figures and offer insights into their business progression.

news.headline: Cidara Therapeutics to present on CD388 drug-Fc conjugate at IDWeek 2024 in Los Angeles, focusing on safety and efficacy.
news.summary: San Diego, on October 16, 2024 - Cidara Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CDTX), a biotechnology company utilizing its unique Cloudbreak® platform for developing drug-Fc conjugate (DFC) immunotherapies focused on enhancing patient care and saving lives, revealed plans to deliver two presentations at IDWeek 2024, scheduled from October 16–19, 2024 in Los Angeles, CA. These presentations will outline crucial clinical data regarding the safety, pharmacokinetics, and preventative benefits of Cidara’s influenza DFC asset in its clinical phase, CD388.

news.headline: Berkshire Grey Inc. launches V3 Put Wall, an enhancement for global solutions, aimed at increasing efficiency.
news.summary: Berkshire Grey Inc. has introduced the V3 Put Wall, the newest version of its widely used solution implemented worldwide.

news.headline: Torr Metals sends crews to explore Filion Gold Project's vast potential along 42-km corridor for high-grade gold.
news.summary: The Filion Gold Project holds significant untapped exploration potential, covering a 42-kilometer structural corridor that has not been explored yet. This corridor is renowned for its high-grade gold deposits.

news.headline: Arq, Inc. (NASDAQ: ARQ) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, with conference call at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Arq, Inc., a sustainable products company based in Greenwood Village, Colorado, will be releasing its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 and filing its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ending September 30, 2024, before the market opens on November 7, 2024. The company, listed as (NASDAQ: ARQ), specializes in producing activated carbon and other environmentally friendly carbon products for purification and sustainable materials. A conference call to review the financial performance is set to start at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day.

news.headline: ISC will release its Q3 financial results on Nov 5, 2024. Statements available on SEDAR+ and ISC website.
news.summary: Regina, Saskatchewan, on October 16, 2024 - Information Services Corporation (TSX:ISV) announced that it will disclose its financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, on Tuesday, November 5, 2024, after the stock market closes. Interested parties can access ISC’s Unaudited Condensed Consolidated Interim Financial Statements, along with Notes and Management’s Discussion and Analysis for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2024, through SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca and the company's official website at www.isc.ca.

news.headline: Theriva Biologics' VCN-01 receives orphan drug designation by European Commission and FDA for treating retinoblastoma.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Rockville, Maryland, Theriva Biologics revealed that the European Commission has endorsed the European Medicines Agency's suggestion to designate lead clinical candidate VCN-01 as an orphan medicinal product for treating retinoblastoma. Theriva Biologics, trading on NYSE American as TOVX, focuses on developing therapies for cancer and related ailments with significant unmet needs. VCN-01, an oncolytic adenovirus that selectively degrades stroma systemically, has already received orphan drug designation and rare pediatric disease designation from the FDA in the United States for treating retinoblastoma.

news.headline: Wolfspeed nominates Thomas Seifert & Woody Young to Board of Directors. Shareholders to vote at 2024 Annual Meeting.
news.summary: Durham, North Carolina- Wolfspeed, Inc. revealed today that Thomas Seifert and Woody Young are nominated for positions on the company's Board of Directors, pending shareholder approval at the upcoming 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on December 5, 2024. Thomas Seifert has experience as the Chief Financial Officer of Cloudflare, Inc., a prominent internet security firm. Wolfspeed, known as the forefront leader in silicon carbide technology, trades on NYSE under the symbol WOLF.

news.headline: Voltera acquires 2 new ZEV infrastructure sites in California, expanding portfolio to 22 across key hubs nationwide.
news.summary: Voltera, a notable player in the development and management of charging infrastructure for zero-emission vehicle fleets, has revealed the procurement of two new sites for ZEV infrastructure expansion. With this addition, the company now possesses a total of 22 sites strategically placed in crucial transit locations within California, Texas, Georgia, Arizona, and Florida. These sites signify Voltera's dedication to meeting the rising need for environmentally friendly transportation solutions.
